name: Orecchietta Con Cime Di Rapa o Con Verdure Stagionali
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli rabe in two quarts of water. Bring to a boil.
2. Add pasta and cook until pasta is al dente. Drain, pour into serving bowl, and set aside.
3. In frying pan, saute garlic in olive oil.
4. Add anchovies and bread crumbs. Cook for two to three minutes.
5. Pour mixture over pasta and rabe.
